parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "sender": {"name": "YOUR_NAME", "email": "YOUR_EMAIL"},
  "to": [{"email": "{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.email }}", "name": "{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.name }}"}],
  "subject": "We'd love to work with you!",
  "textContent": "Hi {{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.name }},

Thanks for reaching out and showing interest. I'm glad you took the first step.

I had a quick look at your details, and it seems like a good fit. I'd love to understand your requirements better so we can move forward.

Could you share a bit more about what you're trying to achieve?

Looking forward to hearing from you!"
}

={
  "sender": {"name": "YOUR_NAME", "email": "YOUR_EMAIL"},
  "to": [{"email": "{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.email }}", "name": "{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.name }}"}],
  "subject": "Thank you for reaching out",
  "textContent": "Hi {{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.name }},

Thank you for taking the time to reach out and share your requirements with us.

After reviewing the details, we feel that your current requirements may not be the right fit for our services at this time. We truly appreciate your interest and the opportunity to connect.

We wish you the very best with your project and future plans. If things change down the line, please feel free to reach out again.

Best regards,
YOUR_NAME"
}
